calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing Re: Petition Of Barbara Oden To Perpetuate Testimony Of Donnie Reese By Videotaped Deposition
Off Calendar Dec-30-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES Via CourtCall:
Kimberly J. Chu of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing for petitioner and moving party Barbara Oden.
Kimberly Quon of WFBM, LLP (714-634-2522), appearing for defendant Hust Brothers.

RULING:
Not contested and tentative ruling adopted: Petition of Barbara Oden to Perpetuate Testimony of Donnie Reese by Videotaped deposition is GRANTED under Code of Civil Procedure section 2035.010. Petitioner filed proofs of service as to all prospective defendants named in the petition. All parties must file a Notice of Special Appearance within two court days upon receipt of this order. The deposition is to take place by Zoom technology within 30 days of the entry of this order. Order signed in open court. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Clerk: A. Mok. Not reported. (503/CML)
